⠿ Hero
SEO Specialist
Hello, I'm
Tien Pham.
SEO Specialist · Ho Chi Minh City
I am a dedicated SEO Executive with over 2 years of experience in developing and executing comprehensive SEO strategies. My expertise includes in-depth keyword research, competitor analysis, content planning, on-page and technical optimization, link building, and performance reporting. I have successfully implemented global SEO for English-speaking markets and managed agency partners across MENA and LATAM, specifically within the finance sector. I am proficient in monitoring key SEO metrics to drive organic growth and ensure all project goals are consistently met.In addition to my SEO expertise, I have Python programming skills for SEO automation, including automatically resizing images, inserting logos, and generating AI-created visuals and many tasks to enhance the speed of SEO.

⠿ Expertise
Expertise & Skills
Technical SEO & Data
Optimize Core Web Vitals, Page Speed to the extreme, crawl budget optimization, and JS/bot source structure handling. Deep technical diagnosis to overcome algorithm barriers.
🌐
Website Design & Management
Directly design, build, and manage WordPress CMS. Intervene with HTML/CSS to upgrade interfaces, optimize On-page UI/UX, and improve end-to-end user experience.
📈
Data Reporting & Looker Studio
Build automated SEO reporting dashboards using Looker Studio, integrating GA4 and GSC. In-depth data analysis to make optimization decisions based on real metrics.
🎯
SEO Performance Audit
Analyze and evaluate data crawl performance, measure comprehensive website health metrics to identify growth bottlenecks.
📋
SEO Strategic Planning
Build in-depth Roadmap plans, forecast traffic ROI, and direct sustainable target campaigns for businesses.
⠿ Case Studies
SEO Case Studies
Measurable Results
🏛
📷
SEO Optimization for FLC Hotel and Resort
Role: SEO Executive|2023–2024|Interior design & manufacturing (bedrooms, townhouses, kitchens, workshops)
📄 Context

A custom-coded website with existing SEO but poor results. Initial organic traffic was only 3,900 visits/month. Highly competitive interior design niche.

⏱ Main Challenges
  • Large image volume causing low Page Speed.
  • Required unique, size-consistent, color-consistent images.
  • Needed deep topic cluster research to compete with major players.
🎯 Goals
  • Grow traffic to 15,000 visits/month.
  • 85% of keywords in Google Top 10.
✅ Strategy & Solutions
  • Page Speed optimization & image storage mechanism.
  • Topic cluster building + high-quality image content creation.
  • Long-term keyword ranking commitment.
27,500
traffic/month (+605%)
80% of target keywords ranked #1 on Google.
